questions.question: What are the different user roles within FieldPulse?
questions.answer: Admin, Team Manager, Service Agent, Limited Agent, Assignment User

questions.question: At a high level, how would you describe how each of these user roles differ?
questions.answer: Admin users have access to everything. Team Managers and Service Agents have access to web & mobile app with configurable permissions toggled on/off by admins. Limited Agents can only access mobile app, can only upload files, use timesheets, be assigned to a team, can only see jobs directly assigned to them. Assignment Users have no access to web or mobile app, can be assigned to jobs/tasks/subtasks, receive email when assigned.
key_points: Team Manager/Service Agent = web & mobile with configurable permissions
Limited Agent = mobile only, limited visibility
Assignment User = no app access, email notifications only

questions.question: What persona typically matches the Admin user role?
questions.answer: Owner, Office Admin

questions.question: What persona typically matches the Team Manager user role?
questions.answer: Team Lead, Managers, Master Technicians

questions.question: What persona typically matches the Service Agent user role?
questions.answer: Technician

questions.question: What persona typically matches the Limited Agent user role?
questions.answer: Apprentice, contractor

questions.question: What persona typically matches the Assignment User user role?
questions.answer: Subcontractors or even equipment/vehicles that the business might need to assign to jobs

questions.question: Can a FieldPulse customer create their own unique permissions?
questions.answer: NO! But they can toggle on/off the different available permission settings for each of their users

questions.question: Can I give EACH individual technician access to a different Status Action Flow?
questions.answer: NO! Status Action Flows are created per role type not by each individual technician.

questions.question: Can a Service Agent view unscheduled/unassigned jobs in the mobile app?
questions.answer: NO!

questions.question: Can a Service Agent create Jobs assigned to themselves?
questions.answer: Yes, if the permission is toggled on in Company Settings.

questions.question: What are notable things that a Limited Agent User CANNOT do?
questions.answer: No access to web app, cannot set reminders, no Offline Mode, cannot open customer records from assigned Jobs, no customer list visibility, cannot change job status, No recurring jobs, No subtask visibility, No maintenance agreement visibility, No asset visibility, No financial visibility or ability to create these records

questions.question: Do Assignment Users get access to the FieldPulse platform? How do they know where to go?
questions.answer: No! They get an email outlining where they need to be, the time they need to be there, and any notes.

questions.question: As a service agent, what 3 fields cannot be filled out/adjusted on a Customer record in mobile?
questions.answer: Price Tiers, Net Due Dates for Estimates/Invoices, and Parent-Child relationship information.

questions.question: Can I create a new Customer record as I'm creating a Job record?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: Can I create a new Customer record as I'm creating an Estimate/Invoice record?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: Can I create a new Customer record as I'm creating a Project record?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: Can I create a new Customer record as I'm creating an Asset record?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: Can I create a new Customer record as I'm creating a Maintenance Agreement record?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: What is the difference between Parent-Child relationships and Multi-Location/Multi-Contact?
questions.answer: Parent-Child: each account syncs separately to QB, flexible billing (bill to parent OR child). Multi-Location/Multi-Contact: Add multiple service locations and contacts under one OG customer record, only the main OG customer syncs to QB.
key_points: only main customer syncs to QB

questions.question: Do Net Due Dates on Parent automatically apply to Child?
questions.answer: The actual values don't transfer, but the 'rule' does. For example, if parent has estimates due in 15 days and invoices due in 90 days, child records will follow those same rules.
key_points: child follows parent's due date rules

questions.question: Where do I find each customer's unique Customer Portal login link?
questions.answer: Customer Record > Actions button > Copy Customer Portal Link

questions.question: Can a Customer Portal link be embedded into a Company's website?
questions.answer: NO!

questions.question: Can videos and pictures be viewed from the Customer Portal?
questions.answer: Yes!

questions.question: Can customers pay their Invoice records via the customer portal?
questions.answer: Yes, but only if the FieldPulse user has FieldPulse Payments enabled.

questions.question: In the customer portal, can a Parent customer see everything related to the Child customer?
questions.answer: Yes!

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: What is the difference between Projects, Jobs, and Site Visits?
questions.answer: Projects: folder that stores/organizes Job & Site Visit records, for long term work. Jobs: standalone or part of a Project, for work typically completed that day (standalone) or over several days/weeks (part of project). Site Visits: subcomponent of a Job record, for callbacks/go backs/return visits.
key_points: Jobs = standalone or part of project
Site Visits = subcomponent of Job for callbacks/return visits

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: What are the benefits of using Site Visit records instead of creating a brand new Job?
questions.answer: Quicker creation, directly attached to the primary work order, all information under one primary record. Don't have to duplicate a record leaving half info in one job and half in another.

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: If you hear 'Call Back/Go Back/Follow Up' what record type do you recommend?
questions.answer: Site Visit

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: What is the difference between Job Notes & Field Notes?
questions.answer: Job Notes - carried over from Customer record and office staff adds info. Field Notes - where technicians dump their notes/findings while in the field.
key_points: Job Notes = from customer record/office staff
Field Notes = technician notes from the field

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: Can Job record Custom Fields change per each Job Template?
questions.answer: No.

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: Can I have multiple contacts listed on one Job record?
questions.answer: No, only one.

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: Can multiple Estimate and Invoice records be attached to one Job record?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: What can be attached to a Job Template?
questions.answer: Subtask, Material Lists, Estimate, Invoices, Forms, and Files.

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: What feature for scheduling the most qualified technician? What needs to be done first?
questions.answer: The Find Availability feature on the Job record. User skillset tags have to be created in Company Settings first.

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: What is a Task in FieldPulse? Give 3 examples.
questions.answer: Tasks are non-billable events that appear on the calendar. Don't need to be assigned to any specific customer. Examples: PTO, internal meetings, lunch breaks, errands.

questions.section: General Knowledge: Projects, Jobs, Site Visits, & Tasks
questions.question: How does a Task get added to the schedule?
questions.answer: Create the Task Category in Company Settings. Then act as if creating a Job, but select Create Task. Complete the Task Category field, select team members, and date/time.

questions.question: ClearPath pitch in 4 sentences or less
questions.answer: With ClearPath, you, as a business owner, can customize the instructions and actions available to your technicians during each step of their workflow. This ensures that your technicians no longer question what to do or where to go within the mobile app; everything they need will be on one main screen.

questions.question: List at least 3 value props of ClearPath.
questions.answer: Consistency for customers because each tech completes job same way; save time because guesswork removed; easier onboarding of new team members; save time with templates for Estimates and Forms; save time with default prepopulated text for comments.

questions.question: Describe the relationship between Job Custom Status Workflows, Status Action Flows, and Focus View
questions.answer: Job Custom Status Workflows are the high-level Statuses common to a type of work. Status Action Flows allow the business to outline the steps and instructions for each specific job they perform (e.g., Shower Installation vs Toilet Installation). Focus View provides the custom mobile experience that neatly displays all of this information for each technician.
key_points: Status Action Flows = specific steps/instructions per job type

questions.question: Are Action Buttons, Status Instructions, and Widgets all required at all times?
questions.answer: Nope! A customer can choose to just use Action Buttons and/or Status Instructions OR take it further by enabling Focus View and utilizing Widgets.

questions.question: Are technicians always locked into Focus View?
questions.answer: You can decide on a per Status basis when you want technicians to be locked into Focus View.

questions.question: Attach a photo of you viewing a ClearPath flow from the mobile app.
questions.answer: SCREENSHOT

questions.question: What can we create Custom Status Workflows for?
questions.answer: Job, Projects, Site Visits, Material Lists, Custom Forms, Estimates, and Invoices

questions.question: What are the benefits of some Status types in Custom Status Workflows?
questions.answer: Travel Time and In Progress status types track/log time. Pending status type pauses the time tracking.

questions.question: What two Status Types are required to save a Custom Status Workflow?
questions.answer: A 'New' and 'Completed' type of status are required.

questions.question: What are the 4 schedule views in FieldPulse?
questions.answer: List, Calendar, Dispatch, & Map view

questions.question: Can the Schedule be printed?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: What does the Hourglass button on the Schedule do?
questions.answer: View all unscheduled and unassigned Jobs.

questions.question: How can someone view upcoming Jobs associated with a Maintenance Agreement?
questions.answer: Click Hourglass button, then in slide out window select Filter button, then in 'Is a Maintenance Agreement Job' field select 'Yes'.

questions.question: What does the '...' near the Hourglass button allow customers to do?
questions.answer: Adjust the color coding on the Schedule. Color coding can either mirror the Statuses of each Job OR each team member.

questions.question: How does Route Optimization work? What are the limitations?
questions.answer: Schedule a Route or Reassign Jobs from a map view. Limitation is that this process is manual and not automated.

questions.question: How do I get access to the Booking Portal?
questions.answer: Must be enabled from Features & Plugins page. Then configure via Company Settings > Booking Portal tab.

questions.question: Do Booking Portal requests auto-create a new Customer record?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: Can end customers attach pictures and videos to Booking Portal requests?
questions.answer: Yes, they can attach files, photos, and videos, but only if the FieldPulse user configured their Booking Portal that way.

questions.question: How do I embed the Booking Portal on my website?
questions.answer: Embed the iFrame for your Booking Portal URL found in Company Settings > Booking Portal tab.

questions.question: What is an Asset in FieldPulse? List 2 examples.
questions.answer: Asset records allow users to track information about assets they install and/or service for customers as well as track internal equipment. Examples: Water heater, employee computers/phones.

questions.question: Why should we showcase Assets before jumping into Maintenance Agreements?
questions.answer: The flow is better on a live demo. On the Asset record we can show how to relate the Asset to other record types like Maintenance Agreements and Jobs.

questions.question: Can a Service Agent scan barcodes on assets?
questions.answer: Yes!

questions.question: What is a Maintenance Agreement in FieldPulse?
questions.answer: A Maintenance Agreement outlines the times a business will go out and perform maintenance on something they installed. Service frequencies typically quarterly or semi-annual. Contracts can be attached after the record has been created and saved.

questions.question: Best practice for MA occurrence and billing creation?
questions.answer: All MA occurrences and billing details must live strictly under the MA record itself, not the origin Job or on an Estimate/Invoice record.

questions.question: Can multiple assets be listed on one invoice and billed together?
questions.answer: No.

questions.question: How can a technician review work order history for a specific asset?
questions.answer: From the Asset record, click the Related Jobs subtab.

questions.question: Two ways GPS coordinates can be used to find exact locations?
questions.answer: 1) Asset record GPS coordinates - attach coordinates to an asset for navigation. 2) GPS coordinates in Address Line 1 of Customer record - for properties without conventional addresses.

questions.question: Is Recurring Jobs standalone or always tied to Maintenance Agreement?
questions.answer: Yes, Recurring Jobs is a standalone feature. Recurring Billing houses Invoice records for Recurring Jobs. Maintenance Agreements house Job records and Invoice records separately.

questions.question: Is ACH supported in Recurring Billing?
questions.answer: No.

questions.question: Do we currently have Recurring Billing templates?
questions.answer: No.

questions.question: Can Recurring Billing be created in the mobile app?
questions.answer: No.

questions.question: Do saved credit cards pull into Recurring Billing?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: How can Material Lists be used? Give two examples.
questions.answer: 1) Go List/Checklist for technician to load truck with needed tools/materials. 2) Pre Estimate Step - add items to Material List for billing, inventory deducted at Completed status, then pull items into Estimate or Invoice.
key_points: Pre Estimate step for billing items

questions.question: What is a Line Item in FieldPulse?
questions.answer: A Line Item is anything customers need to complete a Job - parts, materials, labor and overhead.

questions.question: How can we describe a Job/Service in terms of Estimate & Invoice creation?
questions.answer: A job/service is a collection of Line Items; what is needed to complete the job and charge the end customer.
key_points: what's needed to complete job and charge customer

questions.question: What is the purpose of an Expiration Date on an Estimate?
questions.answer: Sets a time limit for how long quoted prices and terms are valid. Protects against price volatility. Encourages timely customer decisions.

questions.question: What are Bundles? Where do I create them?
questions.answer: Bundles are created in Company Settings and group together services and parts commonly added together. Save time by adding multiple items at once. Next best thing if not ready for Pricebook.

questions.question: How many Estimate options can be added?
questions.answer: 30 Estimate options, but best practice is 3 (Good, Better, Best).

questions.question: When is it crucial for a Contract to be attached to an Estimate?
questions.answer: When the user is looking to collect a signature on the Estimate in person/face-to-face with their customer.

questions.question: How many Contracts can be attached to an Estimate or Invoice?
questions.answer: Only one.

questions.question: Can every FieldPulse user request a down deposit on an Estimate?
questions.answer: MUST HAVE FIELDPULSE PAYMENTS ENABLED. On Draft Estimate click View Estimate, then Email to Customer, enter Payment Request Amount.

questions.question: Can a voice recording be attached to an Estimate or Invoice?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: Can a user leverage different logos and branding from one Estimate to the next?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: What limitations of child record estimate/invoice workflow cause problems?
questions.answer: The invoice remains tied to the child record, so you don't get true billing from parent to child. For proper parent-level billing the invoice must be created under the parent account.
key_points: invoice must be created under parent

questions.question: Difference between standard and Serialized Inventory tracking?
questions.answer: Standard tracks quantities of identical items in bulk. Serialized tracks each individual item with a unique serial number. Serialized has preconfigured Asset templates where serial number auto-fills.

questions.question: Can Custom Fields be added to Inventory Line Items? Give examples.
questions.answer: Yes! Examples: Aisle, Shelf, Bin Number.

questions.question: When does Inventory get deducted?
questions.answer: Users select deduction preference: Material List (at Completed status) or Invoice (at Invoiced/Finalized status).

questions.question: Can a user decide which hub Inventory deducts from?
questions.answer: No, Inventory deducted from the Material List or Invoice creator's assigned hub every time.

questions.question: Can FieldPulse support truck-swapping technicians for Inventory?
questions.answer: No, doesn't track cross-truck usage in real time. Would be a huge manual lift, should not recommend.

questions.question: How can supplier/vendor website links be saved for quick access?
questions.answer: Via Item List, add URL to Item Link section for each Line Item (Mobile) or click Add Link button next to Unit Cost (Web).

questions.question: Can FieldPulse validate inventory availability in real time?
questions.answer: No. Inventory levels are not checked in real time when adding items to estimates, invoices, or material lists.

questions.question: Best practice for reallocating materials after bulk shipment?
questions.answer: Manually move materials to trucks. Cannot have POs send inventory to multiple warehouses or trucks. Mobile: adjust quantities with +/- buttons per Hub. Web: similar manual adjustment.

questions.question: How to keep track of expenses in FieldPulse?
questions.answer: NO_ANSWER

questions.question: How many suppliers/vendors on one PO?
questions.answer: Only one.

questions.question: Does FieldPulse support partial receiving on a PO?
questions.answer: No!

questions.question: What is Supplier Chat? Value props?
questions.answer: Direct access to 8,500+ suppliers across 25 industries. Free feature. Can ask about inventory, pricing, order status, how to place an order. Can create PO and send via Supplier Chat. Available on web AND mobile.

questions.question: What Commission structures are available?
questions.answer: Company Default Commission, User-Specific Commission, Flat Rate Job Commissions (Pricebook), Ad-Hoc Commission.

questions.question: Can Commission be split?
questions.answer: Yes, but at the moment this is a manual process, not automatic.

questions.question: Can FieldPulse run payroll or integrate with payroll software?
questions.answer: No. Can bring in time but that's it. Export time and use outside of platform.

questions.question: Value props of Pricebook? How explain to prospect?
questions.answer: Simple tool for technicians to create estimates/invoices quickly using preset flat-rate items and bundles. Build custom estimate/invoice on-site with tiered choices (Good/Better/Best). Present for signature and payment. Makes upselling easier, reduces quoting time, helps close jobs in the field.

questions.question: What does flat rate pricing mean?
questions.answer: One set price for a job or service instead of billing by hour or by each part. Customer knows total cost upfront.

questions.question: Can Price Tiers be managed through Pricebook?
questions.answer: No, Price Tiers are tied to Customer records not Pricebook.

questions.question: Can each Pricebook have different permissions per user?
questions.answer: No! Permissions cannot be set per pricebook. Access control applies to the Pricebook feature as a whole.

questions.question: What industries utilize Pricebook the most?
questions.answer: HVAC, Plumbing, Garage Door

questions.question: Main differences between Wisetack and Acorn Financing?
questions.answer: Wisetack: 3.9% convenience fee, $500-$25,000 loan range, FieldPulse user must apply (US based, 1 year in business, $150K revenue, 10+ reviews at 4.5+ stars). Acorn: No application for FieldPulse user, end customer applies directly, Acorn wires funds to end customer, $1,000-$100,000 loan range.
key_points: Acorn: no application, end customer applies, $1K-100K, funds to end customer

questions.question: Which financing to recommend and when to offer?
questions.answer: Acorn Financing. Free for users, no application. 12+ lenders. Offer on Estimates (not Invoices) because funds take 1-2 business days. Customers may choose 'best' option since they have funding.

questions.question: Can both Wisetack and Acorn be offered on Estimate records?
questions.answer: Nope! Must choose one or the other.

questions.question: Response to customer wanting to keep their own financing company?
questions.answer: Wisetack and Acorn are the only native options. Can add a link to their existing provider in the default Estimate email body.
key_points: add link in Estimate email body

questions.question: Who are our 2 main Fintech payment partners?
questions.answer: Rainforest & CardConnect

questions.question: Can a user cancel FieldPulse Payments at any time?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: Do we charge extra for American Express?
questions.answer: Nope! Huge value prop.

questions.question: Monthly fee for FieldPulse Payments? Can it be waived?
questions.answer: $9. Yes, can be waived if Premium Support is purchased.

questions.question: Standard FieldPulse Payments (Rainforest) fees?
questions.answer: 3% + $0.25 per transaction & 1% ACH

questions.question: Fees with Next-Business Day Funding?
questions.answer: 3.5% + $0.25 per transaction & 1.5% ACH

questions.question: What is Card Fee Recovery (CFR)?
questions.answer: A compliant dual pricing program that allows customers to pass on card processing fees to their customers.

questions.question: What does CFR look like in FieldPulse?
questions.answer: CFR dynamically increases line item price by chosen %. Invoice displays higher Total Card Price (with fees) and Total ACH/Cash Price (base price, since illegal to pass on ACH fees).
key_points: illegal to pass on ACH fees

questions.question: Can customer choose what % of fees to pass on with CFR?
questions.answer: Yes! Recommends 3%, but can pass on whatever they want.

questions.question: Fees with Card Fee Recovery?
questions.answer: 4.0% & 1.0% ACH (ACH fees cannot be passed on)

questions.question: Fees with Next-Business Day Funding AND CFR?
questions.answer: 4.5% & 1.5% ACH (ACH fees cannot be passed on)

questions.question: Does Rainforest have automated monthly statements?
questions.answer: No automated monthly statements. Users get FP Payments tab with dynamic reports for deposits, payments, chargebacks. Can export data.

questions.question: Is FieldPulse Payments PCI Compliant?
questions.answer: Yes, PCI Level 1 and SOC 2 compliant.

questions.question: Why is Reporting important?
questions.answer: Informed decision-making, performance tracking (KPIs), enhanced customer service, operational efficiency, financial management.

questions.question: What user roles have access to Reporting?
questions.answer: Admin & Team Managers

questions.question: Is Reporting available in mobile app?
questions.answer: No!

questions.question: How is a visual graph/chart created in Reporting?
questions.answer: Run report, highlight data, right click or double click, select Chart, make edits. Yes it can be added to Dashboard.

questions.question: Can you create custom dashboards for different user roles?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: How to build a report for technician callbacks?
questions.answer: Select month date range > Site Visit report > group by technician.

questions.question: Can one report pull all data in FieldPulse?
questions.answer: No. Reporting is per record type.

questions.question: Are custom Dashboards available in mobile app?
questions.answer: No. Pulse Dashboard shows Jobs and Timesheets.

questions.question: Can unscheduled jobs be scheduled from mobile app Schedule?
questions.answer: No.

questions.question: Can technicians take videos in mobile app?
questions.answer: No.

questions.question: What two actions trigger GPS location pins?
questions.answer: When technician advances through Job Statuses and when they clock in and clock out.

questions.question: Which GPS location is saved and viewable whenever?
questions.answer: Only the clock in/out location. Cannot view history of where Status was changed.
key_points: cannot view status change location history

questions.question: Where to open Engage in mobile app?
questions.answer: Click Profile icon in top left corner, then click Open Engage button.

questions.question: Can all user roles access Offline Mode?
questions.answer: No! Only Admin, Team Managers, and Service Agents.

questions.question: What can be done in Offline Mode?
questions.answer: Whole app is NOT accessible. Customers: cache related customers, access/edit 200 existing Custom Forms, create unlimited new draft forms. Jobs: cache 1 week, change status, upload 50 photos, save notes, access/edit 200 forms. Projects: cache 1 week, access/edit 200 forms. Custom Forms: up to 20 templates. Estimates & Invoices: cache 600 total, search 10K line items, view cached payments, preview finalized records, gather signatures, update status, 100 estimate/100 invoice templates. Cannot: collect payments, generate PDF. New drafts: can create linked to records, cannot preview/convert/collect signatures/payments/PDF.

questions.question: What is 10DLC compliance?
questions.answer: All numbers for SMS to U.S. numbers must be approved through The Campaign Registry (TCR). Industry-wide compliance program enforced by mobile carriers to reduce spam and protect consumers.

questions.question: What is the two-step 10DLC compliance process?
questions.answer: 1) Brand Registration: submitting business details. 2) Campaign Registration: publishing SMS compliance pages on user's website (Facebook groups not accepted).

questions.question: Two ways a phone number can be ported into Engage?
questions.answer: Standard Port in Process (from most providers, LOA + latest bill, submit port request in Twilio). Twilio-to-Twilio Process (submit Twilio support ticket).

questions.question: Timeline for each port-in process?
questions.answer: Standard: 3-5 weeks. Twilio-to-Twilio: Same day to 3 days.

questions.question: Can Engage support extensions?
questions.answer: Engage does not support extensions. IVR on main number requires routing to different line. Calls cannot transfer back to same number without loops.

questions.question: Do call recordings expire or get deleted?
questions.answer: No, stored indefinitely. Can download from Call History or Reporting feature.

questions.question: What versions of QB Desktop does FP integrate with?
questions.answer: Current year through last two years (e.g., 2024 and newer in 2026). Cannot be QB Desktop for Mac (PC Only).

questions.question: What ensures QB Desktop sync is successful?
questions.answer: Sleep mode must be disabled, stable internet connection, disable notifications & communication triggers.

questions.question: Does FP integrate with free edition of QB Online?
questions.answer: No.

questions.question: What editions of QB Desktop does FP integrate with?
questions.answer: Contractor, Pro, Premier, and Enterprise

questions.question: How many QB accounts can sync to one FP account?
questions.answer: Only one.

questions.question: How many FP accounts can sync to one QB account?
questions.answer: Only one.

questions.question: How do Job records sync with QB?
questions.answer: They do NOT sync.

questions.question: Can QB Projects sync into FP?
questions.answer: Yes, but not recommended because they sync as Related Customers.

questions.question: What data syncs from QB Online? One way or two way?
questions.answer: Customers (two way), Line Items (two way), Estimates (two way), Invoices (two way), Payments (two way), Purchase Orders (two way), Vendors (two way)

questions.question: What data syncs from QB Desktop? One way or two way?
questions.answer: Customers (two way), Line Items (two way), Estimates (two way), Invoices (two way), Payments (two way), Purchase Orders (ONE WAY - FP to QB)
key_points: Purchase Orders ONE WAY FP to QB

questions.question: What is a Business Class in QB?
questions.answer: Classes categorize transactions into meaningful segments such as departments and locations. Track profitability and expenses by specific areas.

questions.question: What is a Sales Account in QB?
questions.answer: Income account that records revenue from products and services, appears on Profit & Loss report.

questions.question: When does an Estimate/Invoice sync to QB?
questions.answer: Estimate syncs when in Sent type of Status. Invoice syncs when in Invoiced type of Status.

questions.question: Does Inventory sync from both QB Online and Desktop?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: How does Inventory Quantity sync?
questions.answer: Total inventory sync, specific inventory hubs do not.

questions.question: Does Inventory sync differently if hubs are enabled?
questions.answer: No. Updates to item quantities in QBO will not reflect in FP and vice versa. Manage separately.

questions.question: Common reason why Invoice would not sync?
questions.answer: Customer is archived or not synced, line item archived or not synced, notes exceeding 4000 characters, estimates/invoices in closed accounting period.

questions.question: What data cannot sync from QB Desktop?
questions.answer: Customer names >31 chars, special non-ASCII characters, line item names >31 chars, sales receipts, shipping fees, payments on estimates, additional payment methods beyond cash/check/credits/card/ACH, subclasses.

questions.question: What data cannot sync from QB Online?
questions.answer: Customers: additional contacts/locations/custom fields/tags/files. Line Items: tags/UPC barcode/links/suppliers. Invoicing: grouping/custom fields/contracts/deposit field/shipping fees/surcharges. Payments: journal entries/refunds/voiding payments/custom payment types. Others: QB receipts/grouping/FP Projects or Jobs.

questions.question: When does a Customer record sync to QB?
questions.answer: Customers are the first to sync once initiated. Helps track how customers were brought in.

questions.question: How to keep track of supplier contacts without syncing to QB?
questions.answer: NO_ANSWER

questions.question: What can FieldPulse migrate?
questions.answer: Customers, Additional Locations, Additional Contacts, Jobs, Estimates, Invoices, Assets, Maintenance Agreements.

questions.question: Is a QB sync the same as a data migration?
questions.answer: No. QB sync is a data transfer with basic customer details, estimates, invoices, items, and payments. Data migration is a paid service that moves more detailed records.
key_points: migration = paid service with more detail

questions.question: What info is generally needed for a data migration?
questions.answer: Access to prospect's current FSM or client to provide exports of desired data.

questions.question: Are photos and files generally included in a data migration?
questions.answer: No. In most cases, FSMs cannot provide the needed data to import photos.

questions.question: Can FP migrate MA records and credit cards on file?
questions.answer: Yes to Maintenance Agreements. Yes to cards on file if details can be provided by prospect (requires old merchant to provide tokens).
key_points: Yes to cards if tokens provided by old merchant

questions.question: Does FieldPulse have an Open API?
questions.answer: Yes.

questions.question: What is the point of using our API?
questions.answer: NO_ANSWER

questions.question: Does tech support/product team help with API?
questions.answer: No. Prospects/customers need someone on their team that understands this.

questions.question: Who qualifies for onboarding?
questions.answer: Companies with 3-9 FULL users (not including Limited Agent users).

questions.question: Who qualifies for implementation?
questions.answer: Companies with 10+ FULL users (not including Limited Agent users).

questions.question: What resources under Standard Support?
questions.answer: Help Center and access to Chat/Email/Phone support team.

questions.question: Support Team hours?
questions.answer: US: Monday-Friday 7AM-6PM CST. AUS: Monday-Friday 8AM-5PM AEST.
